name: Restaurant & Café
description: Eateries, cafés, cloud kitchens, bakeries and bars

subcategories.name: Fine Dining
subcategories.description: Upscale sit-down restaurant with curated menus
sceneEnvironments: Elegant restaurant interior at dusk, warm pendant lighting over a beautifully plated gourmet dish in sharp focus, soft bokeh of diners behind
Chef plating a refined dish at the pass, gentle steam rising, dark moody kitchen background with warm highlights
Intimate candlelit table setting, crisp linen, polished glassware, a signature dish as the hero with shallow depth of field
greetingExamples: Wishing you a delicious festive season from our kitchen to your table
Celebrate the moments that matter, beautifully plated
offerExamples: Date Night for Two — complimentary dessert

subcategories.name: Café & Coffee Shop
subcategories.description: Cozy neighbourhood café, espresso bar or coffee roastery
sceneEnvironments: Cozy café corner with morning light, a latte with leaf art on a wooden table, soft steam, blurred warm interior
Espresso pour into a cup, rich crema, barista hands in soft focus, warm earthy café tones
Flat-lay of coffee cup, croissant and open notebook on a rustic table near a sunlit window
greetingExamples: Warm wishes and warmer coffee this festive season
Here's to fresh mornings and good company
offerExamples: Buy 1 Get 1 on all coffees this weekend
Free pastry with every cappuccino before 10am

subcategories.name: Bakery & Desserts
subcategories.description: Bakery, patisserie, cake studio or dessert parlour
sceneEnvironments: Display of freshly baked pastries and cakes, golden warm light, dusting of sugar, shallow focus
Decorated celebration cake on a stand, soft pastel backdrop, delicate piping detail in focus
Baker's hands dusting flour over fresh bread, warm rustic kitchen, morning light
greetingExamples: Sweeten your celebrations with us this season
Wishing you joy, one slice at a time
offerExamples: Box of 6 cupcakes at the price of 4
